description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called report and a hidden template .run. Add a job for each component (accessibility, acquisition, activation, agent_foundations, ai_framework, analytics_instrumentation, anti-abuse, api, authentication, authorization, build, cells_infrastructure, ci_functions_platform, ci_platform, cloud_cost_utilization, code_creation, code_review, compliance, composition_analysis, container_registry, contributor_success, custom_models, database_frameworks, database_operations, dataops, design_system, development_analytics, development_tooling, duo_chat, dynamic_analysis, editor_extensions, engagement, environment_automation, environments, feature_readiness, fulfillment_platform, geo, git, gitaly, global_search, import, infrastructure, …) each named `<component>-prompt-for-slipping-triage`. Every job extends the .run template, runs in the report stage, sets the variable TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to `policies/generated/prompt-for-slipping-triage.yml.erb/<component>.yml`, and includes two rules: `if: $PROMPT_FOR_SLIPPING_TRIAGE` and `if: $PROMPT_FOR_SLIPPING_TRIAGE_<COMPONENT>`.
